title: The Taoist Classics: The Tao Te Ching, Lieh Tzu, and Chuang Tzu
rationale: This collected volume brings together Thomas Cleary's translations of all three foundational Taoist texts — Tao Te Ching, Chuang Tzu, and Lieh Tzu — in one consistent idiom. It serves as a comprehensive single-volume introduction to the Taoist canon, filling the gap between popular single-text translations and multi-author anthologies. Its inclusion of the less-translated Lieh Tzu makes it especially valuable for this leaf directory.
